summary: Iteration 89 - Menu Management across branches and delivery platforms. FIXED route ordering bug that caused bulk endpoints to fail. Backend: 15/15 tests pass. Frontend: All features verified working.
updated_files: /app/backend/routers/cashier_pos.py - Fixed route ordering: moved bulk-branch-assign and bulk-platform-assign BEFORE parameterized routes (/cashier/menu/{item_id}) to prevent FastAPI from matching 'bulk-branch-assign' as an item_id
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Iter89_Item, TEST_Iter89_FullItem during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Menu management across branches/platforms fully working. Key features: 1) /api/cashier/menu-all returns all items including unavailable, 2) PUT /api/cashier/menu/{id}/branches and /platforms update assignments, 3) Bulk assignment endpoints work after route fix, 4) Export menu endpoint formats items per platform with custom prices, 5) Menu filtering by branch includes items with empty branch_ids (all branches)

get_menu_all.returns: All 54 menu items including unavailable ones

filter_by_branch.note: Items with empty branch_ids are included for all branches

add_edit_dialog.branches_tab: Shows all branches with toggle checkboxes, 'Available at all branches' badge
add_edit_dialog.platforms_tab: Shows all platforms with toggle and custom price input

item_selection.method: Click checkbox or use Space key
item_selection.visual_feedback: Orange ring around selected cards, '1 selected' text

menu_cards.branch_badges: Shows 'All Branches' or specific branch names

bug_fixed.issue: Bulk assignment endpoints returning 422 validation error
bug_fixed.root_cause: FastAPI route ordering - /cashier/menu/{item_id} was defined BEFORE /cashier/menu/bulk-branch-assign, causing 'bulk-branch-assign' to be matched as item_id parameter
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Moved bulk endpoints before parameterized routes in cashier_pos.py
bug_fixed.before: POST /menu -> PUT /{id} -> DELETE /{id} -> PUT /{id}/branches -> PUT /{id}/platforms -> PUT /bulk-branch-assign -> PUT /bulk-platform-assign
bug_fixed.after: POST /menu -> PUT /bulk-branch-assign -> PUT /bulk-platform-assign -> PUT /{id} -> DELETE /{id} -> PUT /{id}/branches -> PUT /{id}/platforms
